title: More helpful error messages when loading Yosys Witness files with `yosys-smtbmc`
body:
Closes #5503.

_What are the reasons/motivation for this change?_

#5503 points out that the error messages from `yosys-smtbmc` are not helpful when we load an invalid witness file. This PR adds more helpful error messages.

_Explain how this is achieved._

Adds more helpful error messages for a number of cases:
- Indexing a memory out of bounds (previously seems like it would have generated invalid code)
- Memory or signal not found (previously gave an unhelpful error message)
- Some bits of signal left uncovered by witness file (previously  gave an unhelpful error message)

I'm not as sure on the memory portion of the code -- would love someone with more experience with memories to take a look.

_Make sure your change comes with tests. If not possible, share how a reviewer might evaluate it._

Test provided!
